ul.li: Safety: Atomic Commit via Journal Sync

g.title: Manages page cache (LRU), concurrency, and rollback journal state machine.
On-disk 'hot' journal containing original 4KB page images for atomicity.
Main B-Tree file storage (.db). Page-indexed persistence layer.
Virtual File System interface: Unix (flock/fcntl) or Windows syscalls.

g.text: sqlite3_step(UPDATE table SET val=1 WHERE id=1)
Transition: Process signals intent to write; blocks other RESERVED/PENDING attempts.
Blocking Call: Wait for all concurrent SHARED readers to clear.
COMMIT POINT: Transaction is permanent; Rollback no longer possible.
